tool_calls.content:
python3.12 - <<'PY'
> import os, stat
> for p in ['/usr/bin/python3.12']:
>     try:
>         st=os.stat(p)

>         print(p, oct(mode))
>         if mode & 0o111:
>             os.chmod(p, mode & ~0o111)
>             print('CHMOD_DONE', p, oct(stat.S_IMODE(os.stat(p).st_mode)))
>         else:
>             print('ALREADY_NONEXEC', p)
>     except Exception as e:
>         print('ERR', p, e)
